commit.message:
fix: reorder Dockerfile stages to serialize BuildKit execution

Root cause of BuildKit RPC disconnect: frontend-builder (pnpm install),
rust-base (apt-get), and runtime (apt-get) all run in parallel,
overwhelming the daemon on resource-constrained machines.

Fix: Move rust-base stage BEFORE frontend-builder so COPY --from=rust-base
is valid. Both frontend-builder and runtime now depend on rust-base,
forcing BuildKit to complete rust-base first before starting the other
heavy download stages. Also increased stall timeout from 180s to 600s
for slow Rust compilation, and reverted to docker compose build (the
docker-container buildx driver caused watchdog false positives).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix turret/depot normals on closed tunnels using winding order

For closed polygons, using a reference point (spawn) to determine
inward normals fails on complex shapes with bulges/chambers. Now
computes the polygon's signed area to determine winding direction,
then uses the geometrically correct inward normal for each edge.
Open caves still use the spawn point reference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Google Sign-in staying on login page

- AuthPage: catch auth/popup-blocked and fall back to signInWithRedirect;
  silently ignore auth/popup-closed-by-user (user dismissed)
- App: await getRedirectResult before subscribing to onAuthStateChanged
  so any pending redirect credential is applied before auth state is read,
  preventing the race that showed the login page after a redirect sign-in

Caffeine 캐시 TTL 최적화 분석: 19개 캐시 전수 검증 및 조정 추천

19개 캐시의 데이터 변경 빈도, 무효화 로직, maxSize 적정성을 정적 분석하고,
통합 테스트로 히트율/DB 쿼리 수를 정량 측정하여 6개 캐시의 TTL 조정을 추천한다.
- topCategories 1분→10분 (불변 데이터, 90% 쿼리 절감)
- bestSellers/newArrivals/deals 1분→3분 (CacheEvict 즉시 무효화, 66.7% 절감)
- popularKeywords 1분→3분 (순위 변동 느림)
- activeCoupons 10초→30초 (CacheEvict 즉시 무효화, 66.7% 절감)

commit.message:
fix: FastMCP 2.14.6으로 업그레이드 및 SSE 마운트 수정

Starlette 1.0.0과 FastMCP 2.0.0 호환성 문제로 /mcp/sse 엔드포인트에서
NoneType is not callable 에러 발생. FastMCP 2.14.6으로 업그레이드하고
mcp.sse_app() → mcp.http_app(transport="sse")로 변경.
uvicorn, httpx 버전 핀 완화로 의존성 충돌 해소.

commit.message:
fix: mobile discover not loading on first visit

The fetch guard checked flow.stage !== "results" which blocked fetching
when no ?tab param was in the URL. On mobile there's no category select
stage, so the page showed an empty spinner indefinitely. Now the guard
only blocks on desktop (>=1024px), allowing mobile to fetch immediately.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(critical): string ops on datetime after timestamptz migration in Events API

_seed_sessions_from_db() падала на сравнении datetime > str (line 879).
_parse_ts(), _extract_date(), delay_stats, staff_list, _session_to_row,
_delivery_to_row, _get_ready_time — все обёрнуты для работы с datetime.
compute_lateness/compute_pickup_lateness — добавлен isinstance check.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix winding cave self-intersections, add terrain validation

Rewrote winding S-curve generator to use proper perpendicular offsets
from a dense center path, preventing left/right wall segments from
crossing each other. Reduced amplitude and jitter.

Added self-intersection detection: if any generated terrain has
crossing segments, it falls back to a safe wide-bowl shape.

commit.message:
Add pillar/island cave styles, fix bullet tunneling, default seed=1

New level styles: 'pillar' (central column to fly around) and 'island'
(floating enclosed obstacles with turrets). Islands are additional
closed polylines rendered and collided alongside main terrain.

Bullet-through-floor fix: added raycast check from previous to current
bullet position, catching fast bullets that skip past thin segments.

Default random seed changed from 0 (random) to 1 (deterministic).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Hergebruik rider details (foto, specialiteiten, etc.) uit andere competities

nationaliteit, gewicht en specialiteiten automatisch overgenomen van
dezelfde renner (pcs_slug) uit eerdere competities.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add psychology-driven nudge metrics below each countdown

Auto-selects the most impactful secondary unit based on time remaining:
- >5 years: years + workdays
- 1-5 years: months + workdays
- 3-12 months: weeks + weekends
- 1-12 weeks: workdays + weekends
- <1 week: sleeps

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix release build: use separate entitlements without Sign in with Apple

Developer ID distribution doesn't require the applesignin entitlement
(only App Store does). Using a release-specific entitlements file
avoids the provisioning profile requirement on CI.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: pin bcrypt<4.1 for passlib compatibility

passlib doesn't support bcrypt>=4.1 which causes "password cannot be
longer than 72 bytes" errors during admin user creation in init_db.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resize logo and update PWA icon to new design

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: segurança, UX do cliente e integração WhatsApp

Segurança (17 correções):
- Proteção CSRF em todos endpoints mutadores
- Session security (httponly, secure, samesite, strict mode)
- Race condition no resgate com transação + SELECT FOR UPDATE
- Nginx + PHP-FPM via Docker (substitui PHP built-in server)
- IP forwarding (X-Forwarded-For) para rate limiting correto
- Validação CPF com dígitos verificadores
- Estorno verifica resgates dependentes antes de permitir
- Expiração de crédito individual por compra (não global)
- Audit trail em login, compras, estornos, resgates, cadastros
- Security headers (X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options)
- Bloqueia acesso a includes/, .env, database.sql via Nginx
- HTTPS redirect via X-Forwarded-Proto
- Senha mínima aumentada para 6 caracteres
- Session regeneration após login

UX do cliente:
- Consulta pública de saldo por telefone/CPF (sem login)
- Auto-cadastro público na página de regras
- Texto das regras atualizado (expiração por compra individual)
- Notificação WhatsApp via Evolution API após compra e resgate
- Boas-vindas WhatsApp no cadastro

UX do atendente:
- Busca por nome parcial com autocomplete (venda, consulta, resgate)
- Atalhos rápidos no dashboard (Nova Compra, Resgatar, Consultar, Cadastrar)
- Dashboard consolidado em 1 query com CTEs (era 6 queries)
- Listagem de clientes sem N+1 (1 query com JOINs, era 100+)

Infraestrutura:
- Monólito HTML separado em index.html + style.css + app.js
- Dockerfile com Nginx + PHP-FPM + Supervisor (Alpine)
- .dockerignore para build limpo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: シミュレーター計算ロジックをスプレッドシート準拠に差し替え

標準報酬月額テーブル・令和7年基礎控除・累進所得税・住民税均等割を反映し、
概算ベースから正確な計算に置換。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

add Meta webhook signature verification

Validates X-Hub-Signature-256 header on incoming Instagram webhook POSTs
using HMAC-SHA256 against META_APP_SECRET. Also adds CLAUDE.md and fixes
embed_pt.py to delete existing ChromaDB collection before re-embedding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 商品明細改用table-fixed+colgroup百分比配置，避免表格溢出

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add level variety, key preferences, bot PIP view, and bug fixes

Level generator: 7 distinct terrain shapes (bowl, shaft, terraced, mesa,
overhang, winding, tunnel variants) replacing the old single-shape generator.
Turrets now placed using spawn point for correct inward normals.

Bullets no longer pass through walls - removed isNearSurfaceEntity bypass
for ship bullets; turret bullets only skip terrain near their own turret.

Key preferences: new Preferences screen for rebinding gameplay keys
(left/right/thrust/fire/shield), persisted to localStorage.

Bot PIP: when a bot is on the same planet, the PIP shows a rendered
mini-view of the bot's scene instead of just a text panel.

Fixed game over screen overlapping high scores (compact layout, prompt
moved to bottom).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: scheduled crawl jobs + auto-library option + sync dashboard/curation settings

Crawler Jobs:
- Added schedule options: one-time, daily, weekly, monthly
- Added 'auto add to library' checkbox (default on)
- Sends period and enable_enrichment to backend

Dashboard/Curation sync:
- Dashboard loads curation settings from localStorage on mount
- Dashboard saves settings back to localStorage on change
- /curation and /dashboard now use the same stored settings
- Preview in /curation matches what /dashboard shows

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: v0.4.0 — state management, agent registry, metrics, caching, routing, and 15 new CLI commands

New modules:
- state.py: remote state backends (local/S3/GCS), SHA-256 lock files, snapshot history, rollback, environment promotion
- registry.py: named agent fleet management with permissions (read/execute/admin)
- memory.py: per-agent persistent key/value fact store in YAML
- cache.py: thread-safe SQL result TTL cache with LRU eviction and whitespace normalization
- tools.py: OpenAI function-calling tool registry with schema inference
- metrics.py: Prometheus-compatible counters/gauges/histograms, /metrics endpoint
- router.py: heuristic complexity scorer routes queries to fast vs powerful LLM

CLI additions (cli.py):
- tabletalk plan — preview apply without writing files
- tabletalk lint — validate context YAML files
- tabletalk lock / check — SHA-256 manifest integrity
- tabletalk rollback — restore manifests from snapshots
- tabletalk promote — copy manifests between environments
- tabletalk discover — auto-generate contexts from live schema
- tabletalk watch — auto-apply on context file changes
- tabletalk agents (register/list/remove) — agent registry management
- tabletalk openapi — generate OpenAPI 3.0 spec

Web server additions (app.py):
- GET /metrics — Prometheus text format
- GET /metrics/json — metrics snapshot
- GET /cache/stats, POST /cache/invalidate — result cache management
- GET/POST/DELETE /webhooks — webhook subscriptions
- Result caching integrated into /chat/stream (TABLETALK_CACHE_TTL/TABLETALK_CACHE_ENABLED)
- Webhook fire-and-forget on query_complete events

interfaces.py additions:
- estimate_cost() — USD cost estimation from token counts
- slow_query_threshold_ms — warns + logs queries exceeding threshold
- _exec_start captured before timeout wrapper for accurate slow-query detection

Tests: 130 new tests (421 total, 0 failing)
Docs: commands.md, api-reference.md, architecture.md, configuration.md updated

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
